title: OWID Grapher charts — Trade (trade as share of GDP)
units: per chart — see each <slug>.metadata.json (grapher) or codebook CSV (panels)
license_terms: CC BY 4.0 (Our World in Data); underlying third-party data subject to original providers' terms — see metadata.json/codebook for source-level citations
notes: Each chart = <slug>.csv (data, long format: Entity,Code,Year,value...) + <slug>.metadata.json (units, sources, citations) from the OWID Grapher CSV API. Per-file time coverage recorded in files[].time_coverage. All-country files kept deliberately (natural download unit; enables adding comparators).
